name: io.github.ariffazil/aaa-mcp
description: Constitutional AI Governance with 10 pipeline tools, 5 container tools, 13 enforced floors (F1-F13), 20+ injection defense patterns, and tri-witness consensus for LLMs. Full MCP JSON-RPC protocol support over SSE.

tools.name: anchor
tools.description: 000_ANCHOR: Constitutional airlock with F11 Authority and F12 Injection Guard (20+ patterns)

tools.name: reason
tools.description: 222_REASON: Hypothesis generation with F2 Truth, F4 Clarity, and F8 Genius enforcement

tools.name: integrate
tools.description: 333_INTEGRATE: Map and ground external knowledge with F7 Humility and F10 Ontology

tools.name: respond
tools.description: 444_RESPOND: Draft plan and response with F4 Clarity and F6 Empathy

tools.name: validate
tools.description: 555_VALIDATE: Stakeholder impact analysis with F5 Peace and F6 Empathy

tools.name: align
tools.description: 666_ALIGN: Ethics and Anti-Hantu check with F9 enforcement

tools.name: forge
tools.description: 777_FORGE: Synthesize solution with F2 Truth and F4 Clarity enforcement

tools.name: audit
tools.description: 888_AUDIT: Final constitutional verdict with F3 Tri-Witness, F11 Authority, and F13 Sovereignty

tools.name: seal
tools.description: 999_SEAL: Immutable audit trail with F1 Amanah and F3 Tri-Witness consensus

tools.name: trinity_forge
tools.description: Unified 000-999 Constitutional Pipeline in a single call (all floors enforced internally)

tools.name: container_list
tools.description: List sovereign stack containers with TTL caching

tools.name: container_restart
tools.description: Restart containers with F1 Amanah logging and 888_HOLD protection

tools.name: container_logs
tools.description: Get container logs with configurable tail length

tools.name: sovereign_health
tools.description: Full health check of sovereign stack

tools.name: container_exec
tools.description: Execute commands inside containers with F11/F12 injection defense
